'''The Wastes''' were a [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]] located beyond [[Bescane/Legends|Bescane]] and restricted by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The worlds in the sector were used by Imperials for testing siege techniques, planetary bombardment, radiation warfare, bioweapon testing, and other prohibited actions. The planet [[Zeta Zero Nine]] was hidden in the Wastes, as was [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Bertroff Hissa]]'s homeworld, [[PL-40112-CE-021105]].<ref name="DH" />
